title: thymus funkii subsp. funkii
intro: Thymus funkii subsp. funkii is a subspecies of the Thymus funkii plant, also known as the Algarve thyme, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Thymus funkii subsp. funkii include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Thymus funkii subsp. funkii can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or infused in carrier oils for topical use, and can also be used in cooking to add flavor to various dishes.
